creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, the PR system intended for system bugs. You have a problem which 
can be perfectly resolved if you email this to questions@FreeBSD.org or 
refer to the Handbook http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/handbook for 
more information. You should do exactly wha the system says though: fsck 
/dev/amrd0s1d and wait till it reports you what is wrong. Thanks for 
using FreeBSD!!
